title: Water Department Reports 2nd Half 2025 Sampling Meet EPA Lead Standard
summary: Syracuse Water Department reports successful compliance with EPA lead standards for the third consecutive period (H2 2025), with 90th percentile lead levels at 12 ppb, below the 15 ppb action level. The department continues corrosion control treatment, third-party sampling oversight, and lead service line replacement initiatives ahead of EPA deadlines.

entity_refs.name: New York State Department of Health

political_signal.description: Public health compliance announcement demonstrating sustained regulatory adherence and proactive infrastructure management; positions administration as responsive to federal mandates and constituent safety concerns.
